description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a fenced yard with a mix of paved and grassy areas. The building features a flat roof with multiple skylights and open courtyards, allowing natural light into the interior spaces. Large windows and sliding glass doors are present on several facades, providing visual connection to the outdoor patios and garden. The property is landscaped with several mature trees and shrubs, offering shade and privacy. The front entrance is defined by a paved walkway and a small porch area, while the backyard includes a patio with outdoor seating. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor integration, and clean, geometric lines.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring both paved and grassy areas. The property is landscaped with mature trees and includes open courtyards and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved walkway, and a small porch area, with trees and fencing visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large glass doors, outdoor patio seating, and a mix of paved and grassy yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard patio, additional windows, and mature trees providing shade and privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing more of the garden area, fencing, and the integration of greenery with the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
